name: Japanese Fruit Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the melted margarine, sugar, eggs, vinegar, and vanilla in a bowl.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
3. Stir in the coconut, chopped nuts, and any additional fruit desired.
4. Pour the mixture into the uncooked pie shell.
5. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 to 50 minutes, or until the pie is browned and set.
6. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
